title: stelis dithele
intro: Stelis dithele, also known as the Yellow Passionflower or Passionflower of the mountains, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its alkaloid compounds. The health benefits of Stelis dithele include its ability to reduce anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Stelis dithele typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to make tea or added to other remedies for their medicinal properties.
